reviews.review_title: I have a few ideas for this
reviews.review_description: Well I would like to start off by saying this is a great project for training but could y’all  make a little realistic!!!!!???? like add grease point to grease your machine and should add blueprints and projects to complete like starting a cultivated field foundation stakes with cut and fill I mean it say training and I was reading that it will be like a weekly subscription or a annual one for $80 if I spend that much on vr training like this I would love for it to be the  best training experience on VR should add osha 10 test too on but seeing that no one replied to my review I won’t be paying $80 to play this
